response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified it as a fan-made slideshow of messages for 'hololive 7th fes. Ridin'on Dreams'. 2. Identified the background music as the theme song 'Ridin'on Dreams' by hololive IDOL PROJECT, as clearly indicated by the on-screen text. 3. Used the search tool to find the lyrics for 'Ridin'on Dreams' by 'hololive IDOL PROJECT'. 4. Successfully located the full lyrics in Japanese. 5. Compiled the data into the requested JSON format, covering the entire duration of the video.
response.global_summary: A fan-made video featuring a continuous slideshow of messages dedicated to the 'hololive 7th fes. Ridin'on Dreams' event, with the official theme song 'Ridin'on Dreams' by hololive IDOL PROJECT playing throughout the entire video.

scenes.description: The entire video consists of a slideshow of messages for the 'hololive 7th fes. Ridin'on Dreams' event, featuring the theme song 'Ridin'on Dreams' by hololive IDOL PROJECT.
